metadata.title: Partner Specialty Crosswalk (US Healthcare)
metadata.description: Inverted index: specialty/role slug -> list of recommended or in-repo healthcare supply partners covering that specialty. Built from 3 source xlsx files by tokenizing the 'Specialties / Roles Covered' column with alias normalization (e.g. RNs/Registered Nurses -> 'rn'). Used by Nova fast-path lookups to answer 'what partners should I use for cardiologists?' style questions.

schema.value_per_key: list of {name, url, status, priority, category, why_it_matters, specialties}
